Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\chani\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-chani-presentation\\3b7f38cd-5a53-4a86-be98-3d2cfecb085b\\tool-results\\basennvki.txt', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
json_start = next\(i for i, l in enumerate\(lines\) if l.strip\(\).startswith\('{'\)\)
data = json.loads\('\\n'.join\(lines[json_start:]\)\)
slides = data.get\('slides', []\)
for i in [2, 8]:  # 슬라이드 3, 9 \(0-indexed\)
    print\(f'=== 슬라이드 {i+1} ==='\)
    slide = slides[i]
    for el in slide.get\('pageElements', []\):
        print\(json.dumps\(el, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

with open\(r'C:\\Users\\chani\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-chani-presentation\\3b7f38cd-5a53-4a86-be98-3d2cfecb085b\\tool-results\\basennvki.txt', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:

Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe << 'EOF'
import openpyxl, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('압핀 요청 파일2.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active
rows = [row for row in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)]

# 블록 시작 위치
block_starts = [i for i, row in enumerate\(rows\) if row[0] == '이동그룹']

students = []   # \(강좌이름, 타임, 학년, 반, 번호, 성명\)
courses = []    # \(강좌이름, 타임, 인원\)

for start in block_starts:
    course_name = rows[start + 1][1]  # 과목명
    time_val    = rows[start + 2][1]  # 타임
    count       = rows[start + 5][1]  # 인원
    
    courses.append\(\(course_name, time_val, count\)\)
    
    # 학생 데이터: 헤더\(순번,학년,반,번호,성명\) 다음 행부터
    i = start + 7
    while i < len\(rows\) and rows[i][0] not in \('', None, '이동그룹'\):
        r = rows[i]
        if r[0] and r[1] and r[2] and r[3] and r[4]:
            students.append\(\(course_name, time_val, str\(r[1]\), str\(r[2]\), str\(r[3]\), str\(r[4]\)\)\)
        i += 1

print\(f'강좌 수: {len\(courses\)}'\)
print\(f'학생 수: {len\(students\)}'\)
print\('강좌 샘플:', courses[:3]\)
print\('학생 샘플:', students[:3]\)
EOF)

Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe << 'EOF'
import openpyxl, sys
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, PatternFill, Border, Side
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('압핀 요청 파일2.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active
rows = [row for row in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)]

block_starts = [i for i, row in enumerate\(rows\) if row[0] == '이동그룹']

students = []
courses = []

for start in block_starts:
    course_name = rows[start + 1][1]
    time_val    = rows[start + 2][1]
    count       = rows[start + 5][1]
    courses.append\(\(course_name, time_val, count\)\)
    i = start + 7
    while i < len\(rows\) and rows[i][0] not in \('', None, '이동그룹'\):
        r = rows[i]
        if r[0] and r[1] and r[2] and r[3] and r[4]:
            students.append\(\(course_name, time_val, str\(r[1]\), str\(r[2]\), str\(r[3]\), str\(r[4]\)\)\)
        i += 1

# ── 헤더 스타일 ──
header_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="4472C4"\)
header_font = Font\(bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=11\)
header_align = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)
thin = Side\(style='thin', color="000000"\)
border = Border\(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin\)

def style_header\(ws, cols\):
    for col, val in enumerate\(cols, 1\):
        c = ws.cell\(row=1, column=col, value=val\)
        c.fill = header_fill
        c.font = header_font
        c.alignment = header_align
        c.border = border
    ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 22

def style_cell\(cell, center=False\):
    cell.border = border
    cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center" if center else "left", vertical="center"\)

# ═══ 파일 1: 학생 명단 ═══
wb1 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
ws1 = wb1.active
ws1.title = "학생명단"
style_header\(ws1, ["순번", "학번", "이름", "강좌이름"]\)
ws1.column_dimensions['A'].width = 8
ws1.column_dimensions['B'].width = 12
ws1.column_dimensions['C'].width = 12
ws1.column_dimensions['D'].width = 20

for idx, \(course_name, time_val, grade, cls, num, name\) in enumerate\(students, 1\):
    # GCCNN: 학년\(1\) + 반\(2자리\) + 번호\(2자리\)
    student_id = f"{grade}{int\(cls\):02d}{int\(num\):02d}"
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=1, value=idx\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=2, value=student_id\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=3, value=name\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=4, value=course_name\)
    for col in range\(1, 5\):
        style_cell\(ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col\), center=\(col in [1,2]\)\)
    ws1.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

wb1.save\("학생명단.xlsx"\)
print\(f"학생명단.xlsx 저장 완료 \({len\(students\)}명\)"\)

# ═══ 파일 2: 강좌 목록 ═══
wb2 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
ws2 = wb2.active
ws2.title = "강좌목록"
style_header\(ws2, ["순번", "강좌이름", "타임", "인원"]\)
ws2.column_dimensions['A'].width = 8
ws2.column_dimensions['B'].width = 20
ws2.column_dimensions['C'].width = 10
ws2.column_dimensions['D'].width = 10

for idx, \(course_name, time_val, count\) in enumerate\(courses, 1\):
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=1, value=idx\)
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=2, value=course_name\)
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=3, value=time_val\)
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=4, value=int\(count\) if str\(count\).isdigit\(\) else count\)
    for col in range\(1, 5\):
        style_cell\(ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col\), center=\(col in [1,3,4]\)\)
    ws2.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

wb2.save\("강좌목록.xlsx"\)
print\(f"강좌목록.xlsx 저장 완료 \({len\(courses\)}개 강좌\)"\)
EOF)

    course_name = rows[start + 1][1]
    time_val    = rows[start + 2][1]
    count       = rows[start + 5][1]
    courses.append\(\(course_name, time_val, count\)\)
    i = start + 7
    while i < len\(rows\) and rows[i][0] not in \('', None, '이동그룹'\):
        r = rows[i]
        if r[0] and r[1] and r[2] and r[3] and r[4]:
            students.append\(\(course_name, time_val, str\(r[1]\), str\(r[2]\), str\(r[3]\), str\(r[4]\)\)\)
        i += 1

header_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="4472C4"\)

header_align = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)

def style_header\(ws, cols\):
    for col, val in enumerate\(cols, 1\):
        c = ws.cell\(row=1, column=col, value=val\)
        c.fill = header_fill
        c.font = header_font
        c.alignment = header_align
        c.border = border
    ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 22

def style_cell\(cell, center=False\):
    cell.border = border
    cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center" if center else "left", vertical="center"\)

wb1 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)

    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=1, value=idx\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=2, value=student_id\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=3, value=name\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=4, value=course_name\)

        style_cell\(ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col\), center=\(col in [1,2]\)\)
    ws1.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

wb1.save\("과학사회_학생명단.xlsx"\)

wb2 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)

ws2.title = "강좌목록"

import openpyxl, sys
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, PatternFill, Border, Side
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('압핀 요청 파일.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active
rows = [row for row in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)]

block_starts = [i for i, row in enumerate\(rows\) if row[0] == '이동그룹']

students = []
courses = []

for start in block_starts:
    course_name = rows[start + 1][1]
    time_val    = rows[start + 2][1]
    count       = rows[start + 5][1]
    courses.append\(\(course_name, time_val, count\)\)
    i = start + 7
    while i < len\(rows\) and rows[i][0] not in \('', None, '이동그룹'\):
        r = rows[i]
        if r[0] and r[1] and r[2] and r[3] and r[4]:
            students.append\(\(course_name, time_val, str\(r[1]\), str\(r[2]\), str\(r[3]\), str\(r[4]\)\)\)
        i += 1

header_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="4472C4"\)
header_font = Font\(bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=11\)
header_align = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)
thin = Side\(style='thin', color="000000"\)
border = Border\(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin\)

def style_header\(ws, cols\):
    for col, val in enumerate\(cols, 1\):
        c = ws.cell\(row=1, column=col, value=val\)
        c.fill = header_fill
        c.font = header_font
        c.alignment = header_align
        c.border = border
    ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 22

def style_cell\(cell, center=False\):
    cell.border = border
    cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center" if center else "left", vertical="center"\)

wb1 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
ws1 = wb1.active
ws1.title = "학생명단"
style_header\(ws1, ["순번", "학번", "이름", "강좌이름"]\)
ws1.column_dimensions['A'].width = 8
ws1.column_dimensions['B'].width = 12
ws1.column_dimensions['C'].width = 12
ws1.column_dimensions['D'].width = 20

for idx, \(course_name, time_val, grade, cls, num, name\) in enumerate\(students, 1\):
    student_id = f"{grade}{int\(cls\):02d}{int\(num\):02d}"
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=1, value=idx\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=2, value=student_id\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=3, value=name\)
    ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=4, value=course_name\)
    for col in range\(1, 5\):
        style_cell\(ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col\), center=\(col in [1,2]\)\)
    ws1.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

wb1.save\("일반진로_학생명단.xlsx"\)
print\(f"일반진로_학생명단.xlsx 저장 완료 \({len\(students\)}명\)"\)

wb2 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
ws2 = wb2.active
ws2.title = "강좌목록"
style_header\(ws2, ["순번", "강좌이름", "타임", "인원"]\)
ws2.column_dimensions['A'].width = 8
ws2.column_dimensions['B'].width = 20
ws2.column_dimensions['C'].width = 10
ws2.column_dimensions['D'].width = 10

for idx, \(course_name, time_val, count\) in enumerate\(courses, 1\):
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=1, value=idx\)
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=2, value=course_name\)
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=3, value=time_val\)
    ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=4, value=int\(count\) if str\(count\).isdigit\(\) else count\)
    for col in range\(1, 5\):
        style_cell\(ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col\), center=\(col in [1,3,4]\)\)
    ws2.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

wb2.save\("일반진로_강좌목록.xlsx"\)
print\(f"일반진로_강좌목록.xlsx 저장 완료 \({len\(courses\)}개 강좌\)"\)

Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe << 'EOF'
import openpyxl, sys
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, PatternFill, Border, Side
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

header_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="4472C4"\)
header_font = Font\(bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=11\)
thin = Side\(style='thin', color="000000"\)
border = Border\(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin\)

def style_header\(ws, cols\):
    for col, val in enumerate\(cols, 1\):
        c = ws.cell\(row=1, column=col, value=val\)
        c.fill = header_fill
        c.font = header_font
        c.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)
        c.border = border
    ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 22

def style_cell\(cell, center=False\):
    cell.border = border
    cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center" if center else "left", vertical="center"\)

def process\(filename, out_student, out_course\):
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(filename\)
    ws = wb.active
    rows = [row for row in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)]
    block_starts = [i for i, row in enumerate\(rows\) if row[0] == '이동그룹']

    students, courses = [], []
    for start in block_starts:
        course_name = rows[start + 1][1]
        time_val    = rows[start + 2][1]
        count       = rows[start + 5][1]
        courses.append\(\(course_name, time_val, count\)\)
        i = start + 7
        while i < len\(rows\) and rows[i][0] not in \('', None, '이동그룹'\):
            r = rows[i]
            if r[0] and r[1] and r[2] and r[3] and r[4]:
                students.append\(\(course_name, time_val, str\(r[1]\), str\(r[2]\), str\(r[3]\), str\(r[4]\)\)\)
            i += 1

    # 학생명단 \(순번|학번|이름|강좌이름|타임\)
    wb1 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
    ws1 = wb1.active
    ws1.title = "학생명단"
    style_header\(ws1, ["순번", "학번", "이름", "강좌이름", "타임"]\)
    for w, width in zip\('ABCDE', [8, 12, 12, 20, 8]\):
        ws1.column_dimensions[w].width = width

    for idx, \(course_name, time_val, grade, cls, num, name\) in enumerate\(students, 1\):
        student_id = f"{grade}{int\(cls\):02d}{int\(num\):02d}"
        vals = [idx, student_id, name, course_name, time_val]
        centers = [1, 2, 5]
        for col, val in enumerate\(vals, 1\):
            c = ws1.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col, value=val\)
            style_cell\(c, center=\(col in centers\)\)
        ws1.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

    wb1.save\(out_student\)
    print\(f"{out_student} 저장 완료 \({len\(students\)}명\)"\)

    # 강좌목록
    wb2 = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
    ws2 = wb2.active
    ws2.title = "강좌목록"
    style_header\(ws2, ["순번", "강좌이름", "타임", "인원"]\)
    for w, width in zip\('ABCD', [8, 20, 10, 10]\):
        ws2.column_dimensions[w].width = width

    for idx, \(course_name, time_val, count\) in enumerate\(courses, 1\):
        vals = [idx, course_name, time_val, int\(count\) if str\(count\).isdigit\(\) else count]
        for col, val in enumerate\(vals, 1\):
            c = ws2.cell\(row=idx+1, column=col, value=val\)
            style_cell\(c, center=\(col in [1,3,4]\)\)
        ws2.row_dimensions[idx+1].height = 18

    wb2.save\(out_course\)
    print\(f"{out_course} 저장 완료 \({len\(courses\)}개 강좌\)"\)

process\('압핀 요청 파일.xlsx',  '일반진로_학생명단.xlsx',  '일반진로_강좌목록.xlsx'\)
process\('압핀 요청 파일2.xlsx', '과학사회_학생명단.xlsx', '과학사회_강좌목록.xlsx'\)
process\('압핀 요청 파일3.xlsx', '학생명단3.xlsx',         '강좌목록3.xlsx'\)
EOF)
